
### unsolved problem  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{
    language=myasm,
    morekeywords={mrmovq,irmovq,rmmovq,rrmovq},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<2|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~},
    moredelim=**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~},
} -->
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseHazard.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseHazard.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::
 

* <em>combine</em> stalling and forwarding to resolve hazard
* assumption in diagram: hazard detected in <code>subq</code>'s decode stage 

   * (since easier than detecting it in fetch stage)
